name: BlueOne Technologies, Inc.
business: The company sells advanced payment infrastructure solutions (Payment Hub, ISO 20022 migration, remittance-as-a-service) to banks, financial institutions, and fintechs, and also offers a remittance platform for converting stablecoin USDT to USD.

exposures.sentence: Following the acquisition of Millennium EBS Inc., we have evolved from our foundational business in prepaid card program management to now a diversified, global provider of advanced payment infrastructure solutions for banks, financial institutions (FIs), and emerging fintech companies.

BlueOne Card will now introduce BlueOne Pay, a platform which will enable a seamless, low-cost conversion of stablecoin USDT (Tether) into USD, delivering funds through bank transfers, prepaid cards, or cash pick up.

catalysts.event: Strategic partnership with Abeam Consulting to promote ISO 20022 and Payment Hub solutions
catalysts.sentence: We have formed a strategic partnership with a global business consulting firm, Abeam Consulting, to leverage their extensive network of banking clients to promote and implement our ISO 20022 and Payment Hub solutions.

catalysts.event: Engagement with a large commercial bank in Nepal for ISO 20022 transition
catalysts.sentence: We have secured an engagement with a large commercial bank in Nepal to facilitate its transition to the ISO 20022 standard, serving as a critical reference case in the South Asian market.

catalysts.event: Discussions for strategic partnership with a Fortune 500 company
catalysts.sentence: Millennium EBS is in discussions to form a strategic partnership with a Fortune 500 company that serves over 600 financial institutions in more than 140 countries.

tamClaims.claim: Outbound remittances in the U.S. exceed $150 billion annually
tamClaims.sentence: more than $150 billion outbound remittances are sent annually in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Over 500 million people globally own crypto assets including USDT
tamClaims.sentence: over 500 million people are globally utilizing and own crypto assets including USDT.

tamClaims.claim: USDT daily trading volume exceeds $70 billion
tamClaims.sentence: USDT is the most widely used stablecoin, with a daily trading volume exceeding $70 billion.
